understanding.goal_understanding: The goal was to solve each level by positioning the selectable piece(s) so that every goal tile marked with `+` in the semantic grid is simultaneously occupied by a selectable piece, progressing through all levels until the engine reports WIN for the final level.
understanding.mechanics_understanding: Each MOVE action shifts the currently selected piece by one cell (3 pixels) in the chosen direction unless blocked by walls or other immovable boundaries; adjacent pushable blocks can be pushed if there is space for them to move. Levels can contain multiple selectable pieces, and control is switched using CLICK on the exact pixel/grid coordinate of another selectable; the movement_blocked hints only indicate nearby objects and don’t guarantee a move will fail.
